_developer_connect_notes.description: Drop this at the managed-settings path (e.g. /Library/Application Support/ClaudeCode/managed-settings.json on macOS, or /etc/claude-code/managed-settings.json on Linux) to point Claude Code at this gateway.
_developer_connect_notes.ca_trust: Set NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS to the gateway CA (claude-gateway/certs/ca.pem) so the CLI trusts the self-signed ALB cert.
_developer_connect_notes.first_connect: On first contact the CLI fingerprints the TLS leaf and prompts the user to trust it; the value above is what the prompt should show.
